name: [BUG-010] No change password endpoint exists
description:
Expected: PATCH /api/auth/password accepts current_password + new_password.
        Actual:   Endpoint does not exist — users cannot change their password.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: PATCH /api/auth/password accepts current_password + new_password.
    Actual:   Endpoint does not exist — users cannot change their password.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-010: No endpoint to change password

AssertionError: Change password endpoint not implemented — returns 404 or 405
assert 404 == 200
 +  where 404 = <WrapperTestResponse streamed [404 NOT FOUND]>.status_code

labels.name: tag
labels.value: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-010: No endpoint to change password')

tags: @pytest.mark.xfail(strict=True, reason='BUG-010: No endpoint to change password')
